subject: how to use Frankenmap?
body:
Dear Warp community, 
    Anyone has an idea how to use Frankenmap? It seems to be integrated in 
Warp, but I really have no idea where and how to use it. The only 
information I have are two papers from Cramer lab, and the github page of 
Frankenmap. 
    Thank you so much in advance! I'm really eager to try Frankenmap to 
improve my map interpretation. 

Best wishes, 
       Da
